expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus requirement and then drafts multiple scenarios that distinguish (a) dashboard-level export paths (Export vs Share/Send/Publish), (b) option combinations (defaults, non-default toggles, cancel/abort, error), and (c) visible completion outcomes (success/started/completed, cancelled/not completed, error). Quote: "This phase 4a draft explicitly distinguishes: - Dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths... - Option combinations... - Visible completion outcomes..."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md labels "Primary phase under test: phase4a (scenario drafting)" and the body is a "4a. Scenario draft set" with scenarios named "Scenario 4a-S1" through "4a-S5", all written as scenario drafts (goals, preconditions, steps, expected outcomes), matching phase4a.
